Container.Name: giphery-api
Container.Overview: Giphery API (FastAPI). Reached through SWAG over the "giphery" docker network — do NOT add a host port mapping. Runs DB migrations automatically on start. Requires giphery-db on the same network.
Container.Description: Giphery API container. Serves the admin web console and the REST API consumed by the Android app. Runs as UID 99 / GID 100 so /mnt/user/appdata mounts are writable.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: Async DSN. Replace CHANGE_ME with the giphery-db password.

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: JWT signing secret. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: INVITE_ENC_KEY
Config.Description: Invite-code encryption key (any string >=32 chars). Generate: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: PUBLIC_BASE_URL
Config.Description: Public HTTPS URL served by SWAG. Used to build GIF raw URLs.

Config.Name: CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
Config.Description: Allowed web-UI origin(s), comma-separated. No wildcard in production.

Config.Name: ENABLE_DOCS
Config.Description: Expose OpenAPI /docs. Keep false in production.

Config.Name: MAX_UPLOAD_BYTES
Config.Description: Max GIF upload size in bytes (16 MiB). Keep below SWAG client_max_body_size.

Config.Name: LOG_RETENTION_HOURS
Config.Description: Hours of rolling logs to keep.
